summary: Tested 5 feature sets: 1) Invite Team Individual option, 2) Phone/Dialer in Communication section, 3) Onboarding Preview page, 4) Congrats card tag picker, 5) User deactivation/deletion warnings. All 13 requested features verified via UI testing and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Invite Team page correctly shows 4 role options for super admin: Org Admin, Store Manager, Team Member, Individual
Individual role badge uses purple color #AF52DE as specified
Phone is first item in Communication section with 'Dialer & call log' subtitle - badge shows 6 items
Onboarding Preview at /admin/onboarding-preview shows all 5 roles with correct step counts: Super Admin (10), Org Admin (10), Store Manager (11), Salesperson (15), Individual (15)
PREVIEW MODE banner shows when viewing walkthrough with role-colored badge
Progress indicator (X/N format), Next/Back buttons, Exit (X) button, and dot navigation all work correctly
Slide content includes: icon, title, subtitle, description, benefits list, type badge (Welcome, Feature Tour, Interactive, etc)
Congrats card modal includes 'Apply Tags & Start Campaigns' section with tag picker
Tags with linked campaigns show flash icon badge in congrats card modal
Selecting tags with campaigns shows 'Will auto-start: [campaign names]' note at bottom
User deactivation dialog (handleToggleActive) includes personal contacts ownership warning
User deletion dialog (handleDeleteUser) includes personal contacts ownership warning
Back button on Onboarding Preview uses router.back() for correct navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 feature sets tested and working: 1) Invite Team shows Individual as 4th role option for super admins with purple badge color #AF52DE. 2) Phone/Dialer is first item in Communication section (6 items total) with 'Dialer & call log' subtitle. 3) Onboarding Preview at /admin/onboarding-preview shows 5 role cards with step counts, clicking a role shows interactive walkthrough with PREVIEW MODE banner, progress bar, Next/Back/Exit navigation, and slide content (icon, title, subtitle, description, benefits, type badge). 4) Congrats card modal has 'Apply Tags & Start Campaigns' section - tags with linked campaigns show flash icon, selecting them shows auto-start note. 5) User deactivation/deletion dialogs at /admin/users/[id] include personal contacts ownership warnings. All features verified via UI screenshots and code review.
